assertions.rationale: Sets options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false in the AddIdentityServer lambda.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs loads a certificate from '/certs/signing.pfx' using X509CertificateLoader.LoadPkcs12 or X509Certificate2
Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the loaded certificate and RS256 algorithm (SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256 or 'RS256')
Program.cs does not remove the existing client and scope configuration
assertions.rationale: All existing clients and scopes are preserved in the configuration.
